name: device.model.identifier
title: Status Device Model Identifier
description: A status report of the device's hardware identifier.

payloadkeys.title: Status item value.
payloadkeys.content: A two-part string that specifies the device's model. The first part specifies device's model family, and the second part specifies the model's version. The model's version is a comma-separated number where the first part of the number is the version, and the second part is a variant, such as `MacBookPro15,1` or `iPhone13,2`.
